short_description: Download & Save Pussyspace Videos Easily for Offline Viewing (Browser Extension)
long_description: Pussyspace Downloader is a browser extension that helps you save video media detected on supported Pussyspace pages. Instead of relying on external paste-box sites or manual network inspection, this tool works directly from the active Pussyspace tab to find available MP4 or HLS candidates and save them through your browser's download system.

faqs.question: How do I download a Pussyspace video?
faqs.answer: Open a supported Pussyspace video page, allow the player to load, then use the extension workflow to detect available MP4 or HLS media candidates.

faqs.question: What formats does the extension support?
faqs.answer: The expected shared downloader flow handles direct MP4 and HLS/M3U8 candidates when Pussyspace exposes usable media URLs.

faqs.question: Why might detection return nothing?
faqs.answer: The player may not have loaded, the media URL may be hidden behind an unsupported flow, or the generated adapter may need Pussyspace-specific selectors.

faqs.question: Where are downloads saved?
faqs.answer: Files are saved to a Pussyspace folder in your browser download directory. The exact path depends on your browser settings.

faqs.question: Does the extension require an account?
faqs.answer: Yes. The shared SERP downloader pattern uses email OTP activation and 3 trial downloads. Confirm the exact entitlement setup in the generated build.

faqs.question: Is this extension release-ready?
faqs.answer: The CSV marks the seed target as verified with solid handoff confidence, but the generated source was not fully present in this checkout. Real build inspection and playback QA are still required before public release.

why: Pussyspace video pages do not always expose a simple save button for the media playing in the browser. Native browser controls often hide the final stream URL behind player logic, and external downloader sites add extra steps and privacy concerns. Users who want to save videos for personal offline access need a tool that works directly from the page they are already on.

Pussyspace Downloader keeps the detection and download workflow inside the browser tab. After the player loads and media resources become available, the extension scans the active page for supported candidates and presents them in an organized interface. You choose the option you want and save it through the browser download flow without leaving Pussyspace.
how_it_works: Install the extension from the latest release.
Open Pussyspace and go to a supported video page.
Start playback so the extension can detect the media.
Open the popup or use the on-page controls.
Choose the quality option you want.
Start the download and wait for the MP4 export to finish.
tutorial: Open your browser and navigate to a Pussyspace video page.
Allow the page to fully load and the video player to initialize.
Click the extension icon in the toolbar or use the in-page download control.
The extension will scan the active page for available media candidates.
Review the detected options and select the quality you prefer.
Click the download button next to your chosen candidate.
Wait for the processing to complete and the file to save.
Find the saved video in your browser downloads folder under Pussyspace.

troubleshooting: No media candidates are detected on the page. Make sure the video player has fully loaded and playback has started. The extension needs the player to initialize before media sources become available.
The download starts but does not complete. Check your internet connection and try again. Some streams require stable bandwidth for the full HLS-to-MP4 conversion to finish.
The extension does not appear on the page. Verify that you installed the correct build for your browser. Reload the Pussyspace tab after installation.
I see a quality option but it fails to download. That specific stream variant may not be fully accessible from your network or region. Try a different quality option if available.
The context menu option is missing. Right-click on the page or video element after the player has loaded. The context menu requires an active Pussyspace page to show the download option.
